productDisplayName: Spykar Men Rts Grey White Pullover Grey Sweaters
description: Composition Grey and white striped cardigan made of 100% cotton, with purple stripes on the chest, V-neck with ribbing, full hand sleeves with ribbed cuffs, ribbed hemline and brand name printed on the left hem Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash in warm water Wash only with like colours Use mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade Use warm iron Welcome the winter in style in this grey cardigan? From spykar. Stylish to the hilt and snug on the body, this cardigan is a great addition to your wardrobe. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you warm and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims and suede shoes to look like the king of casual wear. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6’1”; Chest: 38.5”; Shoulders: 18.5”
